nodes.name: 大分水岭
nodes.summary: 大分水岭是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括White-throated nightjar、Powerful owl、绿宝石鹦鹉等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 新喀里多尼亞
nodes.summary: 新喀里多尼亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括Shining bronze cuckoo、扇尾杜鹃、Channel-billed cuckoo等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 所罗门群岛
nodes.summary: 所罗门群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括Pacific koel、Shining bronze cuckoo、扇尾杜鹃等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 草沼
nodes.summary: 草沼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括黑颈天鹅、赤麻鸭、赤嘴潜鸭等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-throated nightjar
nodes.summary: White-throated nightjar（White-throated nightjar，学名 Eurostopodus mystacalis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 雨林
nodes.summary: 雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联99种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、鳳冠孔雀雉、Amboyna cuckoo-dove等99种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Specifically, their breeding range is in Australia east of the Great Dividing Range, New Caledonia, or the Solomon Islands. Birds are most abundantly found in New South Wales and Queensland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Specifically, their breeding range is in Australia east of the Great Dividing Range, New Caledonia, or the Solomon Islands. Birds are most abundantly found in New South Wales and Queensland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They prefer to nest and roost in dry sclerophyll woodlands with sparse and discontinuous understory. Many individuals have been found to specifically live in woodlands that have experienced disturbances such as forest fires. In New South Wales, birds have been found inhabiting the edges of rainforests and mangroves. Those that winter in New Guinea occur in savannas, open grasslands, forest edges, marshlands and gardens
